data.title: Here’s What Is Going On In The Shiba Inu Community Amid Major Electoral Process
data.description:
The Shiba Inu community is in its most defining moments as it kicks off its first election that will decide an interim president and set the course for the $7 billion token ecosystem’s future. With the fifth “Shib Year” now underway, some community members see the election as a significant step toward decentralization, with debates over leadership, transparency, and accountability heating up across the community. What’s Happening Inside the Shiba Inu Community In an August 4 post titled ELECTIONS, Shiba Inu’s lead developer, Shytoshi Kusama, announced that the community will choose a new lead visionary and councils for each DAO, calling it “the true birth of a network state. ” The election announcement has brought long-standing frustrations to the surface, with some community members accusing Kusama of poor leadership, lack of transparency, and keeping too much control in the hands of a few
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/shiba-inu/shiba-inu-community-process/

data.title: Ethiopian Electric Power to phase out crypto mining operations
data.description:
State-owned Ethiopian Electric Power (EEP) has announced its intention to shut down all the crypto mining operations in the country. According to the body, there are plans for a gradual phase out of all activities related to crypto mining amid growing concerns. Ethiopian Electric Power mentioned that the move became necessary after growing public pressure […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethiopian-electric-power-to-phase-out-mining/

data.title: Colorado man pleads guilty to investment fraud scheme
data.description:
A Colorado native has pleaded guilty to operating a multi-million-dollar investment fraud scheme. In addition, the man has also pleaded guilty to a years-long scheme to defraud the United States Internal Revenue Service (IRS) of taxes linked to the fraudulent investment scheme. According to court documents, the suspect, Timothy McPhee of Estes Park, was accused […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/colorado-man-guilty-investment-fraud-scheme/
